title: 8 Herbal Teas to Alleviate Ear Blockage in Recreational Swimmers
description: Thymus vulgaris teas, made from the leaves of the thyme plant, have been traditionally used to help alleviate ear blockage due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The tea contains compounds like thymol, carvacrol, and borneol, which have been shown to fight off infections and reduce swelling in the ear canal. When you have a blocked ear, try making a tea by steeping 1 teaspoon of dried thyme leaves in 1 cup of boiling water for 5-7 minutes. Then, strain the liquid an...
